overall.description: A static first-person view of a stone fireplace with a roaring fire in a cozy, dimly lit room, rendered in a video game engine. The scene features armchairs flanking the hearth, a tea service in the foreground, and ornate stone carvings above the mantelpiece, creating a warm, peaceful atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy sitting room with stone fireplace

agents.ego_description: sitting in an armchair facing the fireplace, calmly watching the flames flicker

entered.detail: large stone hearth with rough textured interior and metal fire grate
active flames dancing in the fireplace casting warm orange light
upholstered chair arm and back visible in left foreground
upholstered chair back visible in right foreground
teapot and cup on a tray with steam rising from the hot beverage
metal poker and tongs set standing beside the hearth
ornate stone mantelpiece featuring a carved serpentine dragon design
rough-hewn stone wall extending to the left of the fireplace
rough-hewn stone wall extending to the right of the fireplace

segments.scene_description: A perfectly static view from a seated position in a cozy stone-walled room, centered on a roaring fireplace. The warm firelight illuminates the carved dragon mantelpiece and casts gentle shadows across the armchairs and tea set in the foreground, creating an atmosphere of peaceful warmth.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, immersive perspective within a cozy stone-walled room centered on the warmth of a roaring fireplace. It begins from a seated position, where the flickering firelight illuminates a carved dragon mantelpiece and casts gentle shadows across the surrounding space. As the gaze lingers, the light plays across the textures of the stone and the soft fabrics of flanking armchairs. The scene remains anchored in this peaceful atmosphere, focusing on the tea set in the foreground before settling into the rhythmic glow of the hearth.
